acceptance_targets: [chapter_09_prose_001_negation_calibration_tic] On a reread of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:231, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:367, no more than two emotional beats use a negation/correction formula; the revised lines name the feeling or bodily consequence directly enough that each beat reads as its own sentence rhythm rather than another variation of the same template.

findings.acceptance_test: On a reread of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:231, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:367, no more than two emotional beats use a negation/correction formula; the revised lines name the feeling or bodily consequence directly enough that each beat reads as its own sentence rhythm rather than another variation of the same template.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly leans on the same negation-and-correction construction to define emotional texture: the narration keeps telling the reader what a beat is not before naming what it is. Used this often, the pattern becomes a prose tic and starts flattening otherwise strong moments by putting them in the same qualifying rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the emotional calibration beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:231, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:367 so at least four of these beats land in affirmative, materially specific language instead of a 'not X, but/only Y' or 'not X exactly' qualification. Preserve the emotional meaning, but vary the sentence logic so Sena's appraisal, the supper-shame beat, the wash-trough sting, the loft bracing, and the post-revelation shame each arrive through distinct phrasing.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
